data.title: Crypto exchange Bit.com set to wind down operations
data.description:
Bit. com has initiated a three-step shutdown of its operations set to run from December 27 to March 31, 2026. Bit. com has advised its users to migrate their assets through the provided options, such as direct withdrawals and migration to its partner platform Matrixport, before it shuts down by the end of March. Bit. com’s plan for […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bit-com-set-to-wind-down-operations/

data.title: JPMorgan Chase Analyst Turns Bullish on Two Data Center-Related Stocks After ‘Significant Dip’ – And Billionaire Ray Dalio Recently Loaded Up on One
data.description:
JPMorgan Chase believes two data center-linked companies are likely undervalued. In a new CNBC interview, JPMorgan analyst Steve Tusa says he’s bullish on industrials as the sector is being lifted by the hundreds of billions of dollars in hyperscaler capital expenditures (CapEx).
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/12/27/jpmorgan-chase-analyst-turns-bullish-on-two-data-center-related-stocks-after-significant-dip-and-billionaire-ray-dalio-recently-loaded-up-on-one/

data.title: Bitcoin Fractal Hints Next Cycle Bottom To Form Around $45K — Here’s When
data.description:
The price of Bitcoin has continued to struggle under the psychological $90,000 level during the Christmas season, reflecting the sluggish climate of the crypto market. While the premier cryptocurrency and the rest of the crypto market floundered, other asset classes enjoyed significant Christmas season rallies. These recent performances suggest that the Bitcoin price might indeed be at the beginning of a bear market. According to the latest on-chain data, the price of BTC might be heading down to as low as $41,500 in the imminent period of extended downward movement
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/bitcoin-fractal-hints-cycle-bottom-to-form-around-45k/

data.title: Cambodia’s youth population directed to video game development as digital economy opportunity
data.description:
UNICEF’s partnership with Bitget and the global tech industry has been expanded to programs providing access to 21st-century skills for youth across eight countries. As global demand for tech talent rises, adolescent girls in Cambodia are being prepared to thrive in a digital economy through an unexpected entry point: video game development.   The program by […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/cambodias-youth-population-directed-to-video-game-development-as-digital-economy-opportunity/

data.title: Pump.fun, Trump-Backed DeFi, Dominate 2025’s Biggest Token Sales
data.description:
Pump. fun led 2025 token sales, after raising $600 million in minutes, while Trump-backed World Liberty Financial followed with $550 million.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/pump-fun-trump-backed-defi-dominate-2025s-biggest-token-sales/

data.title: DeBot: Users whose accounts were compromised will receive compensation after the statistics are completed.
data.description: DeBot announced on its X platform that, to ensure user asset security, users can access the DeBot asset management page and click the transfer button to transfer assets from their risky wallets to the official secure wallet address. DeBot will provide compensation to affected users after the statistics are completed.

data.title: SlowMist Cosine: Hackers have stolen $255,000 from Debot risk wallet.
data.description: SlowMist's Cosine posted on the X platform that the private keys of users of risky wallets previously flagged by Debot have been stolen. The hackers have currently profited $255,000, and the theft of assets from these risky wallets is still ongoing. Users currently using Debot and still holding assets in risky wallets should transfer them immediately.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 840 USDT with a 1.95% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Dec 27, 2025, 15:16 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 840 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 840.169983 USDT, with a narrowed 1.95% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Zcash Breakout Signal Emerges as Price Reclaims Key $470 Level
data.description:
A new technical setup in Zcash is drawing attention after price surged above a long-standing resistance zone, triggering renewed bullish discussion across crypto markets. According to a chart shared by Ali Charts, ZEC is completing a structure that historically precedes sharp upside continuation, with a potential breakout move already unfolding.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/zcash-breakout-signal-emerges-as-price-reclaims-key-470-level/

data.title: Dogecoin Faces Bearish Ichimoku Rejection: What Might be Next?
data.description:
Dogecoin remains under pressure after failing to break through key Ichimoku resistance levels on the 4-hour timeframe. According to the shared analysis, price continues to trend lower following repeated rejections from both the Kumo cloud and the Kijun-sen base line, signaling sustained bearish control.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/dogecoin-faces-bearish-ichimoku-rejection-what-might-be-next/

data.title: DeBot Addresses Security Concerns Amid Hacking Allegations
data.description: According to Odaily, DeBot has responded to claims from some community users that its wallet may have been compromised by hackers. The official statement on the X platform assures users that the secure wallet addresses are functioning normally and have not been affected. DeBot is aware of the situation concerning certain addresses and is actively monitoring and addressing the issue.

data.title: 0xAA Warns of Wallet Thefts on Blockchain
data.description: According to Odaily, 0xAA has issued a warning on the X platform regarding a significant number of blockchain users experiencing wallet thefts. The specific Bot involved in these incidents has not yet been identified. 0xAA advises users to remain vigilant and consider transferring their funds from Bots to secure wallets or exchanges.

data.title: Trust Wallet Hack Victim? Here Is Your Compensation 101
data.description:
Trust Wallet CEO Eowyn Chen has announced a manual on how to claim compensation post-hack.
source: https://u.today/trust-wallet-hack-victim-here-is-your-compensation-101

data.title: 0xAA: Multiple on-chain users have had their wallets stolen. It is recommended to transfer assets to a secure wallet or exchange.
data.description: 0xAA posted on the X platform that a large number of on-chain players' wallets have been stolen, and the specific bots involved are still undetermined. 0xAA advises users to remain vigilant and transfer funds from bots to secure wallets or exchanges.
